name: retrieval-literature-pubmed

sources.label: PubMed
sources.description: Biomedical article metadata via NCBI E-utilities PubMed APIs.
riskNotes: Read-only public NCBI E-utilities APIs; optional NCBI credentials are projected only when configured.

parameters.description: Maximum PubMed records to request from ESearch.
